Class Blockchain

java.lang.Object
dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Blockchain
All Implemented Interfaces:
dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.IStructure
public class Blockchain extends Object implements dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.IStructure
Represents the blockchain structure for a Bitcoin simulation.

The Blockchain maintains the main chain of blocks, a list of orphan blocks, and tips (latest blocks in each chain). Blocks can be added either as validated new blocks or received via propagation. Transactions are stored within Block objects.

This class implements IStructure to integrate with the simulation engine.

TODO: Consider optimizing some searches (e.g., block by ID) for large blockchains.
See Also:

  • BitcoinNode

  • Constructor Details

    • Blockchain

      public Blockchain()

  • Method Details

    • addToStructure

      public void addToStructure(Block b)
      Crudely request the addition of a validated block to the blockchain. If the Block has a parent (e.g., it has arrived from another node) the parent must be found (by ID) and the Block must be appended on that parent. If parent is not found it is placed in orphans. If the Block does not have parent (e.g., block was just validated by the Node itself) it must be appended on the tallest non-overlapping path to genesis. In reality, the node will in every hash be aware of the parent of the node it is trying to validate and update it based on new events.
      Parameters:
      b - A validated block to be added to the chain.

    • hasChainOverlap

      public boolean hasChainOverlap(Block b, Block tip)
      Checks whether a block overlaps with the transactions in the chain from a given tip to genesis.
      Parameters:
      b - The Block to check for overlaps.
      tip - The tip of the chain to check against - also a Block.
      Returns:
      true if an overlap exists, false otherwise.

    • getNonOverlappingTip

      public Block getNonOverlappingTip(Block b)
      Given a Block b find the tallest tip whose chain to the genesis does not contain transactions whose ID matches one of the IDs in the transactions in b. Searches form tallest to shortest. Return null if such tip is not found.
      Parameters:
      b - The Block to be checked against the tips.
      Returns:
      The tallest tip whose chain to genesis does not overlap with b. Returns null if no such tip is found.

    • contains

      public boolean contains(dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.transaction.Transaction t)
      Checks if a Transaction is contained (anywhere) in the blockchain. Likely to be used in the gossip stage.
      Parameters:
      t - The Transaction to be checked.
      Returns:
      Return true if it is contained false otherwise.

    • contains

      public boolean contains(long txID)
      Checks if a Transaction is contained (anywhere) in the blockchain. Likely to be used in the gossip stage. Anywhere here includes stale blocks, but not orphan blocks.
      Parameters:
      txID - The Transaction ID to be checked.
      Returns:
      Return true if it is contained false otherwise.

    • contains

      public boolean contains(Block block)
      Checks if a Block is contained in the chain that begins from the parent of the block and reaches the genesis. Contained means that any of its transactions is included in the chain being traversed.
      Parameters:
      block - Is the Block to be checked.
      Returns:
      Return true if it is contained false otherwise.

    • getTransactionDepth

      public Integer getTransactionDepth(Block tip, long txID)
      Returns the depth under tip in which transaction exists, or null if the transaction does not exist. The depth includes the block in which the transaction exists.
      Parameters:
      tip - A pointer to a block from where to traverse the blockchain towards the genesis.
      txID - The ID of the transaction.
      Returns:
      The number of blocks under which the transaction is buried (including the block in which the transaction is in), null if the transaction is not found.

    • satisfiesDependencies

      public boolean satisfiesDependencies(dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.transaction.TransactionGroup g, dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.transaction.TxDependencyRegistry reg)

    • satisfiesDependencies

      public boolean satisfiesDependencies(dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.transaction.Transaction t, dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.transaction.TxDependencyRegistry reg)

    • getBlockchainHeight

      public int getBlockchainHeight()
      Returns the height of the blockchain, i.e., the height of the tallest block.
      Returns:
      The height of the tallest block in the blockchain. If the blockchain is empty, returns 0.

    • getLongestTip

      public Block getLongestTip()
      Returns the tip with the longest height.
      Returns:
      The Block with the longest height from the tips list. If the list is empty, returns null.

    • getBlockByID

      public Block getBlockByID(int id)
      Finds a Block in the blockchain by its ID.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the Block to be found.
      Returns:
      The Block with the specified ID, or null if not found.

    • transactionBelief

      public float transactionBelief(long txID)
      Checks if a transaction is believed by the node, i.e., if it exists in the longest chain. This is done by traversing from the longest tip back to genesis and checking if any block contains the transaction ID.
      Specified by:
      transactionBelief in interface dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.IStructure
      Parameters:
      txID - The ID of the transaction to check.
      Returns:
      true if the transaction is found in the longest chain, false otherwise.

    • transactionBelieved

      public boolean transactionBelieved(long txID)
      Checks if a transaction is fully believed by the node, i.e., if it exists in the longest chain. This is done by traversing from the longest tip back to genesis and checking if any block contains the transaction ID. Implemented as a convenience method using transactionBelief(long).
      Parameters:
      txID - The ID of the transaction to check.
      Returns:
      true if the transaction is found in the longest chain, false otherwise.
      See Also:
      • transactionBelief(long)

    • getConfirmations

      public Integer getConfirmations(long txID)

    • printStructure

      public String[] printStructure()
      Print structure for direct presentation. Returns comma separated entries of the format: BlockID,ParentID,BlockHeight,Transactions
      Specified by:
      printStructure in interface dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.IStructure

    • printStructureReport

      public String[] printStructureReport(int nodeID)
      Like printStructure() but with additional information including the ID of the node it exists.
      Parameters:
      nodeID - Node ID to be included in the report.
      Returns:
      An array of comma separated entries with format: SimTime, SysTime, (both at the time of the report) NodeID, BlockID, ParentID, Height, Content (list of transactions), Place (blockchain).

    • printOrphans

      public String[] printOrphans()
      Prints the orphans list.
      Returns:
      An array of comma separated entries, one orphan per entry, in the format: BlockID, ParentID, Transactions (list of contained transaction IDs).

    • printOrphansReport

      public String[] printOrphansReport(int nodeID)
      Like printOrphans() with additional information.
      Parameters:
      nodeID - The node ID to be reported.
      Returns:
      An array of comma separated entries, one orphan per entry, in the format: SimTime, SysTime, (both at the time of the report) NodeID, BlockID, ParentID, Height, Content (list of transactions), Place (blockchain).

    • printTips

      public String printTips(String sep)
      Prints the IDs of the Blocks currently in the list of tips
      Parameters:
      sep - The character to separate the entries with (e.g. "," for comma)
      Returns:
      A string listing the IDs of the tips.

    • printTipsHash

      public String printTipsHash(String sep)

    • printLongestChain

      public String printLongestChain()
      Prints the longest chain from the tip to genesis.
      Returns:
      A human-readable string representing the longest chain.

    • getTransactionGroup

      public dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.transaction.TransactionGroup getTransactionGroup()
